name: Branded in Peace
desc: When this card is activated: Add "Fallen of Albaz" or "Tri-Brigade" monster from your Deck to your hand, then discard card. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Fusion Monsters. Once per turn, during the Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon Level 8 or higher Dragon Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing materials from your hand, field and/or GY, including "Fallen of Albaz as material. During the End Phase, if this card is sent to GY: You can Set "Branded" Spell/Trap directly from your Deck, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only activate। "Branded in Peace" per turn
